name: Peanut Butter Jumbos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease cookie sheets or line with parchment paper.
3. Beat peanut butter, butter, sugars, and eggs in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Blend in baking soda, vanilla, and oats until well mixed.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and candy pieces.
6. Scoop out about 1/3 cup dough for each cookie.
7. Place on prepared cookie sheets, about 4 inches apart.
8. Flatten each cookie slightly.
9. Bake 15-20 minutes or until firm in the center.
10. Remove to wire racks to cool completely.
11. Makes about 1 1/2 dozen large cookies.
